title: fix(deps): update dependency instantsearch.js to v3.5.4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [instantsearch.js](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/) ([source](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js)) | dependencies | patch | [`3.5.3` -> `3.5.4`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/instantsearch.js/3.5.3/3.5.4) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>algolia/instantsearch.js</summary>

### [`v3.5.4`](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​354httpsgithubcomalgoliainstantsearchjscomparev353v354-2019-07-01)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v3.5.3...v3.5.4)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **connectSortBy:** do not throw with wrong indexes ([#​3824](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3824)) ([2a84ee2](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/2a84ee2))
-   **deps:** update dependency instantsearch.js to v3.5.3 ([#​3877](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3877)) ([463f3bb](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/463f3bb))
-   **escape:** make sure that \_\_escaped does not get removed ([#​3830](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3830)) ([fbafd22](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/fbafd22))
-   **getRefinements:** check for facet before accessing its data ([#​3842](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3842)) ([aadc769](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/aadc769))
-   **panel:** return value from dispose ([#​3895](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3895)) ([bceb78f](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/bceb78f))
-   **voiceSearch:** remove event listeners on stop ([#​3845](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3845)) ([688e36a](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/688e36a))

</details>
